FAILUsers can be listedConnectAs a Posit Team administratorsrc/vip_tests/connect/test_users.py::test_list_users0.27sTest procedureGiven Connect is accessible at the configured URLWhen I list all usersThen the user list is not emptyAnd the test user exists in the user listError tracebackCopyfixturefunc = <function check_test_user_in_list at 0x7fcd34a4fb00>
request = <FixtureRequest for <Function test_list_users>>
kwargs = {'test_username': 'testuser', 'user_list': [{'active_time': '2026-05-01T00:15:37Z', 'confirmed': True, 'created_time': '2026-05-01T00:13:59Z', 'email': '', ...}]}

    def call_fixture_func(
        fixturefunc: _FixtureFunc[FixtureValue], request: FixtureRequest, kwargs
    ) -> FixtureValue:
        if inspect.isgeneratorfunction(fixturefunc):
            fixturefunc = cast(Callable[..., Generator[FixtureValue]], fixturefunc)
            generator = fixturefunc(**kwargs)
            try:
                fixture_result = next(generator)
            except StopIteration:
                raise ValueError(f"{request.fixturename} did not yield a value") from None
            finalizer = functools.partial(_teardown_yield_fixture, fixturefunc, generator)
            request.addfinalizer(finalizer)
        else:
            fixturefunc = cast(Callable[..., FixtureValue], fixturefunc)
>           fixture_result = fixturefunc(**kwargs)
                             ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^

.venv/lib/python3.13/site-packages/_pytest/fixtures.py:915: 
_ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ 

user_list = [{'active_time': '2026-05-01T00:15:37Z', 'confirmed': True, 'created_time': '2026-05-01T00:13:59Z', 'email': '', ...}]
test_username = 'testuser'

    @then("the test user exists in the user list")
    def check_test_user_in_list(user_list, test_username):
        expected = test_username.split("@", 1)[0]
        usernames = [u.get("username") for u in user_list]
>       assert expected in usernames, (
            f"Test user {expected!r} (from {test_username!r}) not found in user list: {usernames}"
        )
E       AssertionError: Test user 'testuser' (from 'testuser') not found in user list: ['__bootstrap_admin__']
E       assert 'testuser' in ['__bootstrap_admin__']

2026/05/01 00:17:36.763475376 function (file = if (onefile) "Rplots.pdf" else "Rplot%03d.pdf",
2026/05/01 00:17:36.763482278 width, height, onefile, family, title, fonts, version, paper,
2026/05/01 00:17:36.763516042 encoding, bg, fg, pointsize, pagecentre, colormodel, useDingbats,
2026/05/01 00:17:36.763517054 useKerning, fillOddEven, compress)
2026/05/01 00:17:36.763535157 {
2026/05/01 00:17:36.763535929 initPSandPDFfonts()
2026/05/01 00:17:36.763547751 new <- list()
2026/05/01 00:17:36.763548542 if (!missing(width))
2026/05/01 00:17:36.763562038 new$width <- width
2026/05/01 00:17:36.763562939 if (!missing(height))
2026/05/01 00:17:36.763576575 new$height <- height
2026/05/01 00:17:36.763577346 if (!missing(onefile))
2026/05/01 00:17:36.763594588 new$onefile <- onefile
2026/05/01 00:17:36.763595380 if (!missing(title))
2026/05/01 00:17:36.763608725 new$title <- title
2026/05/01 00:17:36.763609597 if (!missing(fonts))
2026/05/01 00:17:36.763622541 new$fonts <- fonts
2026/05/01 00:17:36.763623493 if (!missing(version))
2026/05/01 00:17:36.763637928 new$version <- version
2026/05/01 00:17:36.763640202 if (!missing(paper))
2026/05/01 00:17:36.763658827 new$paper <- paper
2026/05/01 00:17:36.763659478 if (!missing(encoding))
2026/05/01 00:17:36.763669307 new$encoding <- encoding
2026/05/01 00:17:36.763669868 if (!missing(bg))
2026/05/01 00:17:36.763679326 new$bg <- bg
2026/05/01 00:17:36.763679816 if (!missing(fg))
2026/05/01 00:17:36.763688573 new$fg <- fg
2026/05/01 00:17:36.763689004 if (!missing(pointsize))
2026/05/01 00:17:36.763697990 new$pointsize <- pointsize
2026/05/01 00:17:36.763698481 if (!missing(pagecentre))
2026/05/01 00:17:36.763708630 new$pagecentre <- pagecentre
2026/05/01 00:17:36.763709051 if (!missing(colormodel))
2026/05/01 00:17:36.763727376 new$colormodel <- colormodel
2026/05/01 00:17:36.763727826 if (!missing(useDingbats))
2026/05/01 00:17:36.763785564 new$useDingbats <- useDingbats
2026/05/01 00:17:36.763787107 if (!missing(useKerning))
2026/05/01 00:17:36.763802729 new$useKerning <- useKerning
2026/05/01 00:17:36.763814859 if (!missing(fillOddEven))
2026/05/01 00:17:36.763815710 new$fillOddEven <- fillOddEven
2026/05/01 00:17:36.763827302 if (!missing(compress))
2026/05/01 00:17:36.763827713 new$compress <- compress
2026/05/01 00:17:36.763837582 old <- check.options(new, name.opt = ".PDF.Options", envir = .PSenv)
2026/05/01 00:17:36.763838072 if (!missing(family) && (inherits(family, "Type1Font") ||
2026/05/01 00:17:36.763852038 inherits(family, "CIDFont"))) {
2026/05/01 00:17:36.763852479 enc <- family$encoding
2026/05/01 00:17:36.763862518 if (inherits(family, "Type1Font") && !is.null(enc) &&
2026/05/01 00:17:36.763862979 enc != "default" && (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding ==
2026/05/01 00:17:36.763880231 "default"))
2026/05/01 00:17:36.763881213 old$encoding <- enc
2026/05/01 00:17:36.763896732 family <- family$metrics
2026/05/01 00:17:36.763897644 }
2026/05/01 00:17:36.763907826 if (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding == "default")
2026/05/01 00:17:36.763921390 old$encoding <- guessEncoding()
2026/05/01 00:17:36.763923483 if (!missing(family)) {
2026/05/01 00:17:36.763942359 if (length(family) == 4L) {
2026/05/01 00:17:36.763943280 family <- c(family, "Symbol.afm")
2026/05/01 00:17:36.763958509 }
2026/05/01 00:17:36.763959381 else if (length(family) == 5L) {
2026/05/01 00:17:36.763972956 }
2026/05/01 00:17:36.763973818 else if (length(family) == 1L) {
2026/05/01 00:17:36.763986682 pf <- pdfFonts(family)[[1L]]
2026/05/01 00:17:36.763987573 if (is.null(pf))
2026/05/01 00:17:36.764001489 stop(gettextf("unknown family '%s'", family),
2026/05/01 00:17:36.764002291 domain = NA)
2026/05/01 00:17:36.764031616 matchFont(pf, old$encoding)
2026/05/01 00:17:36.764032678 }
2026/05/01 00:17:36.764045662 else stop("invalid 'family' argument")
2026/05/01 00:17:36.764046444 old$family <- family
2026/05/01 00:17:36.764061251 }
2026/05/01 00:17:36.764062033 version <- old$version
2026/05/01 00:17:36.764073915 versions <- c("1.1", "1.2", "1.3", "1.4", "1.5", "1.6", "1.7",
2026/05/01 00:17:36.764074746 "2.0")
2026/05/01 00:17:36.764087911 if (version %in% versions)
2026/05/01 00:17:36.764088672 version <- as.integer(strsplit(version, "[.]")[[1L]])
2026/05/01 00:17:36.764104682 else stop("invalid PDF version")
2026/05/01 00:17:36.764105574 onefile <- old$onefile
2026/05/01 00:17:36.764121393 if (!checkIntFormat(file))
2026/05/01 00:17:36.764122365 stop(gettextf("invalid 'file' argument '%s'", file),
2026/05/01 00:17:36.764140189 domain = NA)
2026/05/01 00:17:36.764141461 .External(C_PDF, file, old$paper, old$family, old$encoding,
2026/05/01 00:17:36.764159194 old$bg, old$fg, old$width, old$height, old$pointsize,
2026/05/01 00:17:36.764160146 onefile, old$pagecentre, old$title, old$fonts, version[1L],
2026/05/01 00:17:36.764179973 version[2L], old$colormodel, old$useDingbats, old$useKerning,
2026/05/01 00:17:36.764180955 old$fillOddEven, old$compress)
2026/05/01 00:17:36.764195694 invisible()
2026/05/01 00:17:36.764204259 }
